title: Italian Cream-Flapjacked Pancake
description: A unique Italian-inspired twist on classic pancakes, incorporating Russian-style fluffy pancakes with a crispy Italian-style crust.
instructions: 1. Preheat a non-stick skillet or griddle to medium heat.
2. Cook the Russian-style fluffy pancakes according to the package instructions.
3. In a separate bowl, mix together cinnamon and powdered sugar.
4. Dust the cooked pancakes with the cinnamon-sugar mixture.
5. In a separate pan, melt butter over medium heat.
6. Place a pancake in the melted butter and cook for about 2-3 minutes on each side.
8. Serve warm with additional powdered sugar on top if desired.
